composition_vocabulary: Tiles oscillate between tight centred object shots with minimal or stark backgrounds and dense graphic fields; there is little breathing room — forms fill the frame or crowd together, with layered sculptural objects dominating. Negative space appears only when used as dramatic contrast.
lighting_quality: Predominantly studio-controlled with hard or directional light that emphasises volume and surface texture; occasional chiaroscuro on figurative pieces; one cinematic natural-light silhouette at sunset.
material_textures: polished metal, raw bone or ivory, smooth latex or rubber, matte black fabric, brushed or cast gold, biomorphic resin or silicone
aesthetic_register: The sample sits firmly in avant-garde/art-school dark luxury — part talisman, part industrial sculpture, with streetwear-brand DNA in the typography tiles; it reads as mystic-object meets conceptual fashion, not conventional heirloom.
notably_absent: Lifestyle warmth, gemstone close-ups, delicate chain work, human skin worn adorned, and the aspirational-couple or hand-shot visual grammar typical of mainstream luxury jewellery boards are entirely absent.
